import React,{useState}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Login(_ref){let{setIsLoggedIn}=_ref;const[email,setEmail]=useState("");const[password,setPassword]=useState("");const handleLogin=async e=>{e.preventDefault();const res=await fetch("https://fintech-digital-economy.onrender.com/login",{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},body:JSON.stringify({email,password})});const data=await res.json();if(res.ok){localStorage.setItem("token",data.token);// 🔥 IMPORTANT
